BUG-1.description: lastConnectedAt visible in cluster detail page (no type cast needed)
BUG-1.details: API returns lastConnectedAt correctly (2026-02-26T17:26:05.103Z). Cluster LIST page shows 'Last Seen: 3m ago' derived from lastConnectedAt. However, cluster DETAIL page does NOT display lastConnectedAt as an explicit field. The 'Kubernetes v1.33 • —' header shows endpoint (null) not lastConnectedAt.

BUG-2.description: After health-sync: status field reflects actual health (not stuck at unreachable)
BUG-2.details: Both clusters show status='unreachable'. health-sync logs show clusters are being SKIPPED due to invalid connectionConfig (test-cluster-minikube: unrecognized key 'contextName'; prod-cluster-eks: missing accessKeyId/secretAccessKey). No actual health checks are being performed. Status may be correct (clusters unreachable) but health-sync is not functioning properly for either cluster.

BUG-3.description: API starts with zero warnings about CLUSTER_CRED_ENCRYPTION_KEY
BUG-3.details: API startup log line 1: '⚠️  CLUSTER_CRED_ENCRYPTION_KEY is missing or invalid (expected 64-char hex string). Credential encryption will fail.' This warning is still present at startup. CRITICAL regression.

BUG-4.details: Already verified by pipeline, not re-run in this QA session.

findings.title: BUG-3 NOT FIXED: CLUSTER_CRED_ENCRYPTION_KEY missing warning at API startup
findings.details: API logs first line: '⚠️  CLUSTER_CRED_ENCRYPTION_KEY is missing or invalid (expected 64-char hex string). Credential encryption will fail.' This was supposed to be fixed in Phase D but is still present.
findings.impact: Credential encryption will fail for all clusters

findings.title: health-sync skipping ALL clusters due to invalid connectionConfig
findings.details: test-cluster-minikube skipped: unrecognized key 'contextName'. prod-cluster-eks skipped: missing accessKeyId/secretAccessKey. Both clusters never get health-checked.
findings.impact: BUG-2 cannot be verified as fixed since no health checks succeed

findings.title: BUG-1 PARTIAL: lastConnectedAt not displayed in cluster detail page
findings.details: API correctly returns lastConnectedAt. Cluster list shows 'Last Seen: 3m ago'. However, cluster detail page does not show lastConnectedAt as a dedicated UI field.
findings.impact: Users cannot see last connection time on cluster detail page

findings.title: SSE/EventSource MIME type error on cluster detail page
findings.details: Console error: 'EventSource response has MIME type text/plain not text/event-stream'. presence.subscribe endpoint returns wrong content-type. Also ERR_INCOMPLETE_CHUNKED_ENCODING.
findings.impact: Real-time updates may not work on cluster detail page

findings.title: Input fields missing autocomplete attributes on Settings page
findings.details: DOM warning: Input elements should have autocomplete attributes (suggested: 'new-password')

pages_tested.cluster_detail: PARTIAL - status unreachable, no live data available

what_works: Login flow works correctly with auth redirect
Dashboard shows stat cards and cluster cards with environment grouping
Cluster list shows all columns including 'Last Seen' (lastConnectedAt) correctly
Settings page with BYOK configured (Claude Anthropic)
Feature Flags page with toggle, targeting rules, activity log
Audit Log with 234 entries, pagination working
Light mode: good contrast and readability
MCP Integration snippet on settings page
